CustomField.formula: IF( Municipality_Name__r.SharePoint_Folder_Created__c = true, IF( Development_address__r.Development_Folder_Created__c = true, IF( Property_Folder_Created__c = true, SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( SUBSTITUTE( Municipality_Name__r.SharePoint_Folder_Muni_Calc__c & "/" & Development_Address_Text_Calc__c & "/" & Name ," ","%20") ,",","%2C") ,"(","%28") ,")","%29") ,"#","%23") ,"PROPERTY SHAREPOINT FOLDER NEEDED") , "DEVELOPMENT SHAREPOINT FOLDER NEEDED") , "MUNICIPALITY SHAREPOINT FOLDER NEEDED")
CustomField.label: Property Folder
